summary: Tested server-side pagination for Students page. Backend API 9/9 tests PASSED. Frontend working correctly with school filter, search, and pagination. Fixed Dashboard.js bug caused by pagination change.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js was calling studentsAPI.getAll() expecting array, but now receives paginated response {items, total, page, page_size, total_pages}. Fixed by extracting items array before filtering.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Server-side pagination for /admin/students is fully implemented and working. Backend returns {items, total, page, page_size, total_pages}. Frontend shows 'Select school' message when no filter, then fetches paginated data when school selected or search term entered (3+ chars with 500ms debounce).

bug_fix.Dashboard.js filteredStudents.filter err: FIXED - Dashboard now handles paginated response format
